pages.text: $(o)"A king is not unwoundable. A king is merely not allowed to fall."$()$(br2)Royal-issue scroll. When the king fell, morale collapsed in a heartbeat — both privilege and shackle.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)16 blocks$(), all $(l)players$() gain:$(br)· Resistance IV (80% damage reduction)$(br)· Fire Resistance$(br2)Duration: $(l)15 seconds$().$(br2)Cost: $(l)3200$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Team open-engagement. Pair with Chronal Stillness for a 15s ironwall push.$(br2)Solo value still strong — lava-pit cross, magma swim, all routine.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 2 Wellspring$() or above.
